allow: Bash(python -m pip show numpy pandas talib)
Bash(python -c "import talib; import pandas; print\('talib:', talib.__version__\); print\('pandas:', pandas.__version__\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; [print\(p\) for p in sys.path]")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path = [p for p in sys.path if 'AppData' not in p]; import pandas; print\(pandas.__version__, pandas.__file__\)")
Bash(python -c "import talib; import pandas; print\('talib OK, pandas:', pandas.__version__\)")
